issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: AAPL price + SMA(20) + RSI(14) DataFrame pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for yfinance and reimplements indicators manually, missing the obb.technical.sma/rsi helpers entirely, while treatment uses the documented obb.equity.price.historical + obb.technical.sma/rsi chain.

scenarios.name: Expose OpenBB to non-Python agent via HTTP
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-rolls a FastAPI wrapper around yfinance, whereas treatment uses the built-in openbb-api server on port 6900 and the documented /api/v1/equity/price/historical endpoint plus MCP.
